Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: First I need to go through each case and find activities that repeat then figure out their context differences

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: the recurring ones are Verify Documents and Call Customer

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case C001 only Verify Documents is repeated Case C002 only Call Customer is repeated Case C003 only Verify Documents is repeated

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait a key point only activities that repeat in the same case need renaming

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: the only activities that recur within the same case are Verify Documents in C001 and C003 and Call Customer in C002

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First Verify Documents is the initial check and second Verify Documents is a re verification after an intervening step

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First Call Customer in C002 is to clarify account discrepancy and second Call Customer is to confirm adjustments made

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: First Verify Documents occurrence in a case Initial Document Verification second Verify Documents occurrence Post Change Document Re Verification

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: First C002 Call Customer Account Discrepancy Clarification Call second C002 Call Customer Adjustment Confirmation Call

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: we can also rename single Call Customer instances to reflect their purpose for clarity

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: the common thread is that the second Verify Documents happens after a process change such as supplementary submission or account adjustment

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Initiate Request can become Initiate Online Request for portal cases and Initiate Branch Request for the walk in case

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Submit Additional can become Submit Supplementary Documents

Name: Validation - PE
Text: the recurring activities are now clearly renamed Verify Documents becomes Initial Document Verification and Post Change Document Re Verification and Call Customer in C002 becomes Account Discrepancy Clarification Call and Adjustment Confirmation Call

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Adjust Account and Approve Request can remain unchanged because they occur once per case with stable meaning
